stairs with or without railings (needs no human assistance or assistive device)
01 = Requires use of a device (e.g., cane, walker) to walk alone or requires human supervision or assistance to negotiate stairs or steps or uneven surfaces
02 = Able to walk only with the supervision or assistance of another person at all times
03 = Chairfast, unable to ambulate but is able to wheel self independently
04 = Chairfast, unable to ambulate and is unable to wheel self
